message:
🐛 Address Copilot review feedback on #4100 (#4104)

- YAMLDrillDown: Only show full-page spinner on initial load (no yaml
  yet), keep toolbar visible during refresh so animate-spin is visible
- EventsDrillDown: Same pattern — show skeleton only when no events
  and no error, so retry button stays visible with spinning icon
- Deploy.tsx: Guard against empty error messages with trim() fallback
- OperatorStatus.tsx: Add disabled:cursor-not-allowed for UX consistency

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
